ogTitle: Bankstown vs Bankstown Aerodrome: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bankstown and Bankstown Aerodrome.
heading: Bankstown vs Bankstown Aerodrome — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bankstown, New South Wales and Bankstown Aerodrome, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bankstown Aerodrome has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Bankstown (48/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bankstown or Bankstown Aerodrome safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bankstown has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Bankstown Aerodrome scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bankstown scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Bankstown Aerodrome scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bankstown or Bankstown Aerodrome?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bankstown Aerodrome has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
